---
title: "Argelaguet: cell embeddings from genomic windows entropy"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    code_download: true
    number_sections: true
    df_print: default
    theme: lumen
---

```{r logging_early, include = FALSE}
log <- file(snakemake@log$log, open = "wt")
sink(log)
sink(log, type = "message")
```

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(BiocParallel)
  library(uwot)
  library(irlba)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(SingleCellExperiment)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(scater)
  library(cluster)
  library(viridis)
  library(cowplot)
})

source("src/ggtheme.R")
source("src/embedding_utils.R")

param <- SerialParam()

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = TRUE,
  warning = TRUE,
  cache = FALSE,
  fig.path = "argelaguet_embeddings_plots/"
)
```

```{r save_snmk_debug, include = FALSE}
saveRDS(snakemake, file = "snmk_argelaguet_embeddings.rds", compress = "xz")
```

```{r constants}
stage_pal <- c("E4.5" = "#440154", "E5.5" = "#31688e",
               "E6.5" = "#35b779", "E7.5" = "#fde725")

N_HVW <- 1000
N_PCS <- 10

assay_map <- c(
  "sampen"           = "S",
  "sampen_corrected" = "adjS",
  "adjS"             = "adjS_yamet",
  "meth"             = "methylation"
)
```

# Load data

```{r load_sce}
sce <- readRDS(snakemake@params$corrected_sce)
colData(sce)$stage   <- factor(colData(sce)$stage)
## copy to a clean name used throughout; lineage10x is the original column
colData(sce)$lineage <- factor(colData(sce)$lineage10x)

cat("Cells:", ncol(sce), "\n")
cat("Windows:", nrow(sce), "\n")
cat("Assays:", paste(assayNames(sce), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Stages:\n")
print(table(colData(sce)$stage, useNA = "ifany"))
cat("Top lineages:\n")
print(sort(table(colData(sce)$lineage, useNA = "ifany"), decreasing = TRUE))
```

# Shared helpers

```{r helpers}
hvw_pca_umap <- function(mat) {
  run_embedding(mat, n_hvf = N_HVW, n_pcs = N_PCS,
                n_neighbors = 15L, min_dist = 0.3, seed = 42L)
}

plot_umap_stage <- function(coords, sce_obj, title_prefix) {
  df <- data.frame(
    umap1 = coords[, 1], umap2 = coords[, 2],
    stage = colData(sce_obj)$stage
  )
  ggplot(df, aes(x = umap1, y = umap2, color = stage)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.6, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = stage_pal) +
    labs(title = paste(title_prefix, "- stage"), x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2") +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2.5, alpha = 1))) +
    theme_ng()
}

plot_umap_lineage <- function(coords, sce_obj, title_prefix) {
  lv <- sort(unique(as.character(colData(sce_obj)$lineage)))
  pal <- setNames(turbo(length(lv), begin = 0.05, end = 0.95), lv)
  df <- data.frame(
    umap1   = coords[, 1], umap2 = coords[, 2],
    lineage = colData(sce_obj)$lineage
  )
  ggplot(df, aes(x = umap1, y = umap2, color = lineage)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.6, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal) +
    labs(title = paste(title_prefix, "- lineage"), x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2") +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2.5, alpha = 1),
                                ncol = 2)) +
    theme_ng()
}
```

# Per-window embeddings (HVW -> PCA -> UMAP)

HVW selection and NA handling: see `embedding_utils.R`.
Top `r N_HVW` most variable windows retained per assay before PCA and UMAP.

```{r win_hvw_pca_umap}
win_embeds <- lapply(names(assay_map), function(akey) {
  if (!akey %in% assayNames(sce)) return(NULL)
  hvw_pca_umap(as.matrix(assay(sce, akey)))
})
names(win_embeds) <- assay_map

failed <- names(which(sapply(win_embeds, is.null)))
if (length(failed) > 0)
  warning("run_embedding returned NULL for: ", paste(failed, collapse = ", "))

cat("\nHVF selection summary:\n")
for (nm in names(win_embeds)) {
  em <- win_embeds[[nm]]
  if (is.null(em)) {
    cat(nm, ": NULL\n")
  } else {
    cat(nm, ": HVF =", length(em$hvf_idx),
        "| cells =", sum(em$kept_cols), "/", ncol(sce), "\n")
  }
}

saveRDS(
  list(col_data = as.data.frame(colData(sce)),
       sce_dim = dim(sce),
       assay_names = assayNames(sce),
       win_embeds = win_embeds,
       assay_map = assay_map),
  "argelaguet_umap_windows_adjS.rds", compress = "xz"
)
```

## By stage {.tabset .tabset-pills}

```{r win_stage_S, fig.width = ng_fig_size(2, 1, panel_mm = 60)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(2, 1, panel_mm = 60)$h}
### S
if (!is.null(win_embeds[["S"]])) {
  p1 <- plot_umap_stage(win_embeds[["S"]]$umap, sce[, win_embeds[["S"]]$kept_cols], "S (windows)")
  p2 <- plot_umap_lineage(win_embeds[["S"]]$umap, sce[, win_embeds[["S"]]$kept_cols], "S (windows)")
  print(plot_grid(p1, p2, nrow = 1))
}
```

```{r win_stage_adjS, fig.width = ng_fig_size(2, 1, panel_mm = 60)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(2, 1, panel_mm = 60)$h}
### adjS
if (!is.null(win_embeds[["adjS"]])) {
  p1 <- plot_umap_stage(win_embeds[["adjS"]]$umap, sce[, win_embeds[["adjS"]]$kept_cols], "adjS (windows)")
  p2 <- plot_umap_lineage(win_embeds[["adjS"]]$umap, sce[, win_embeds[["adjS"]]$kept_cols], "adjS (windows)")
  print(plot_grid(p1, p2, nrow = 1))
}
```

```{r win_stage_meth, fig.width = ng_fig_size(2, 1, panel_mm = 60)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(2, 1, panel_mm = 60)$h}
### methylation
if (!is.null(win_embeds[["methylation"]])) {
  p1 <- plot_umap_stage(win_embeds[["methylation"]]$umap, sce[, win_embeds[["methylation"]]$kept_cols], "methylation (windows)")
  p2 <- plot_umap_lineage(win_embeds[["methylation"]]$umap, sce[, win_embeds[["methylation"]]$kept_cols], "methylation (windows)")
  print(plot_grid(p1, p2, nrow = 1))
}
```

## Four-panel comparison (stage)

```{r win_panel_stage, fig.width = ng_fig_size(4, 1, panel_mm = 55)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(4, 1, panel_mm = 55)$h}
ok_embeds <- Filter(Negate(is.null), win_embeds)
df_panel <- bind_rows(lapply(names(ok_embeds), function(lbl) {
  em <- ok_embeds[[lbl]]
  data.frame(umap1 = em$umap[, 1], umap2 = em$umap[, 2],
             stage = colData(sce[, em$kept_cols])$stage,
             assay = lbl)
}))
df_panel$assay <- factor(df_panel$assay, levels = assay_map)

ggplot(df_panel, aes(x = umap1, y = umap2, color = stage)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.4, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = stage_pal) +
  facet_wrap(~ assay, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2",
       title = "Per-window embeddings (HVW -> PCA -> UMAP)") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2.5, alpha = 1))) +
  theme_ng()
```

## Variance explained

```{r win_varexp, fig.width = ng_fig_size(4, 1)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(2, 1)$h}
ve_win <- bind_rows(lapply(names(assay_map), function(akey) {
  lbl <- assay_map[[akey]]
  if (is.null(win_embeds[[lbl]]) || !akey %in% assayNames(sce)) return(NULL)
  mat <- as.matrix(assay(sce, akey))
  hvw_mat <- mat[win_embeds[[lbl]]$hvf_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  rownames(hvw_mat) <- NULL
  tmp_cd  <- data.frame(stage = colData(sce)$stage, lineage = colData(sce)$lineage)
  tmp_sce <- SingleCellExperiment(assays = list(x = hvw_mat), colData = tmp_cd)
  ve <- getVarianceExplained(tmp_sce, exprs_values = "x",
                             variables = c("stage", "lineage"))
  data.frame(assay = lbl,
             stage   = median(ve[, "stage"],   na.rm = TRUE),
             lineage = median(ve[, "lineage"], na.rm = TRUE))
}))

ve_long <- pivot_longer(ve_win, c("stage", "lineage"),
                        names_to = "variable", values_to = "median_ve")
ve_long$assay <- factor(ve_long$assay, levels = assay_map)

ggplot(ve_long, aes(x = assay, y = median_ve, fill = variable)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("stage" = "#0072B2", "lineage" = "#E69F00")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "median % variance explained",
       title = "Variance explained (per-window HVW)") +
  theme_ng()
```

## Silhouette scores (by stage)

```{r win_sil, fig.width = ng_fig_size(2, 1)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(1, 1)$h}
sil_win <- data.frame(
  assay = names(ok_embeds),
  silhouette_stage = sapply(names(ok_embeds), function(lbl)
    sil_score(ok_embeds[[lbl]]$umap,
              colData(sce[, ok_embeds[[lbl]]$kept_cols])$stage)),
  silhouette_lineage = sapply(names(ok_embeds), function(lbl)
    sil_score(ok_embeds[[lbl]]$umap,
              colData(sce[, ok_embeds[[lbl]]$kept_cols])$lineage))
)

sil_long <- pivot_longer(sil_win, c("silhouette_stage", "silhouette_lineage"),
                         names_to = "grouping", values_to = "silhouette")
sil_long$grouping <- sub("silhouette_", "", sil_long$grouping)
sil_long$assay    <- factor(sil_long$assay, levels = assay_map)

ggplot(sil_long, aes(x = assay, y = silhouette, fill = grouping)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("stage" = "#0072B2", "lineage" = "#E69F00")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "mean silhouette",
       title = "Cluster separation by assay") +
  theme_ng()
```

# Per-cell entropy summaries

```{r cell_df}
cell_df <- data.frame(
  stage   = colData(sce)$stage,
  lineage = colData(sce)$lineage,
  mean_S    = colMeans(assay(sce, "sampen"),           na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_adjS = colMeans(assay(sce, "sampen_corrected"), na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_meth = colMeans(assay(sce, "meth"),             na.rm = TRUE)
)
```

```{r violins, fig.width = ng_fig_size(4, 1)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(4, 2)$h}
cell_long <- pivot_longer(cell_df, c("mean_S", "mean_adjS", "mean_meth"),
                          names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")

ggplot(cell_long, aes(x = stage, y = value, fill = stage)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, scale = "width", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.size = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = stage_pal) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "stage", y = "per-cell mean") +
  theme_ng() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
